creator: lcampbell@uncod.in
text:
I actually can't repro the mode_t_ issues with the supplied patch --
it seems to work for me as-is.

Can you post your /etc/make.conf, /var/db/ports/desmume/options, or
anything else you can think of that would influence the build? The
links supplied are currently inaccessible for me.

On Thu, May 31, 2012 at 4:52 AM, Ren=E9 Ladan <rene@freebsd.org> wrote:
> The build fails for me in libfat :
>
> http://rene-ladan.nl:8080/tb/errors/7-FreeBSD/desmume-0.9.8.log
> http://rene-ladan.nl:8080/tb/errors/8-FreeBSD/desmume-0.9.8.log
> (and also on a 10.X-amd64 box)
>
> In file included from utils/libfat/common.h:87,
> =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0 from utils/libfat/cache.cpp:40:
> utils/libfat/libfat_pc.h:108: error: 'mode_t_' has not been declared
> utils/libfat/libfat_pc.h:109: error: 'mode_t_' has not been declared
>
> Maybe an include file is missing?
